name: Cucumber Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the grated cucumber in a strainer and sprinkle with salt. Let drain for 15 to 30 minutes.
2. Rinse under cold water and squeeze dry.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the cucumber with the remaining ingredients. Stir well until all are incorporated.
4. Season with additional salt to taste.
5. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
